note: Paired emb192 vs emb128 4-seed ensemble on uniform split. No submission.
verdict: emb192 wins 341 vs 319 on discordant rows (net +22), but McNemar p=0.4137 >= 0.05 -> directionally positive yet NOT statistically significant. The +0.0011 edge is within paired noise; a submission is a low-confidence bet (real downside risk it lands <= 0.77745).
